violations.text: (Ground beef and cheese ) was observed held at (48-51) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
Hot water is lacking at hand sink in kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
Hot water knob on hand sink is in poor repair. Observed knob with tape. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
Establishment is lacking allergen statement for desserts. English Food Allergy Reactions New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

Shaved steak was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by dead rodents on trap and droppings throughout kitchen area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC removed dead rodent from premises. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the pan storage shelves have an accumulation of soil and food residue, debris, and/or rodent droppings.PIC removed and wash and sanitize shelves during inspection Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

The floors throughout the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and /or droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
